description_long: This temple features a tall, ornate golden dome with a pointed spire and cross at the top, characteristic of Eastern Orthodox church architecture. The main structure is rectangular with a blue and white facade, accented by columns and arched windows. The roof below the dome is green and slightly sloped, while the upper section of the building displays a clock face. The entrance is centrally located, framed by columns and an arched doorway, and the facade is decorated with pilasters and subtle geometric detailing. The golden dome is highly reflective, contrasting with the matte finish of the lower building. The overall design is symmetrical and richly detailed, evoking a sense of grandeur and reverence.
description: A blue and white temple with a tall, reflective golden dome and a central arched entrance, featuring classical columns and a clock face on the upper facade.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main arched entrance, clock face, and symmetrical columned facade beneath the golden dome.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view, still showing the entrance and clock, with more perspective on the right side's columns and windows.
description_view_2: Another rotated view, similar to the front but with a clearer view of the left side's architectural details.
description_view_3: View from the opposite angle, mirroring view 1, with the left side's columns and windows more visible.
attribute_ornamentation: moderate geometric patterns, pilasters, clock face, reflective gold dome with ribbed texture
attribute_entrance_design: central arched doorway framed by columns and pilasters, with a decorative lintel and symmetrical facade
